core_modules.description: Primary bundle orchestration utilities for training/inference/config-driven execution; best MCP bridge surface due to stable high-level APIs.
Config parsing and resolution layer for MONAI bundles; suitable for safe, declarative MCP interactions.
Core transform pipeline composition primitives used across data preprocessing and augmentation workflows.
Inference entry layer for patch/sliding-window workflows; key operational runtime surface for deployment-oriented MCP tools.
Model architecture namespace containing importable neural network classes commonly instantiated by bundle configs.
Dataset abstraction layer for scalable medical imaging pipelines; frequently referenced by training/inference workflows.
Training engine abstractions on top of Ignite; useful only for advanced MCP operations due to higher runtime complexity.
High-level Auto3DSeg automation entrypoint; attractive MCP target but heavyweight and dependency-sensitive.
